pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Although Security & Platform Strategy is an edge domain for the Data Platform Team Lead, this task KSA presents sufficient signal (composite score 0.461) and conceptual alignment to include at the team lead level.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Security & Platform Strategy), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.461). External reviewers may question whether this specific task KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the Data Platform Team Lead versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: NIST CSF, CMU SEI enterprise security frameworks, and CDAIO job market data consistently include security and platform strategy oversight for senior data leaders.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with Security & Platform Strategy appearing in job postings and role definition literature for Data Platform Team Lead.

decision_rationale: Edge-domain Security & Platform Strategy task KSA cleared adversarial review with score 0.461. Included based on sufficient framework alignment and role relevance for the Data Platform Team Lead.
